mapper.select: SELECT d.*, e.actual_name as managerName, pd.`name` as parentName FROM t_department d left join t_employee e on d.manager_id= e.employee_id left join t_department pd on d.parent_id = pd.department_id order by sort desc
SELECT count(*) FROM t_department WHERE parent_id = #{departmentId}
select * from t_department where parent_id = #{parentId} and name = #{name}
select * from t_department where enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} and parent_id = #{parentId} limit 1
